message:
feat(fsqlite-vdbe): heap-allocated trigger frame stack (bd-3lj3)

Adds VdbeFrame + FrameStack for nested trigger/subprogram execution
without Rust call-stack recursion. Enforces SQLITE_MAX_TRIGGER_DEPTH
(1000), Cx memory budget, PRAGMA recursive_triggers, RAISE dispatch,
and OLD/NEW pseudo-table register mapping. 14 tests, clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
